title: Remove workspace_root from config schema and runtime code
summary: Remove workspace_root from configuration models, parsing, and runtime code paths so the server relies on the host working directory.
acceptance_criteria: No workspace_root fields exist in configuration schema or parsing.
Runtime code no longer reads or propagates workspace_root.
Any path resolution uses only the host working directory.

steps.description: Find and remove workspace_root in config models and parsing.
Delete runtime code paths that reference workspace_root.
Adjust tests and fixtures to match new config.

notes: Keep changes minimal and scoped to workspace_root removal.
